LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION TO VACATE STAY. THE MATTER IS CALLED. BRIEF DISCUSSIONS ARE HELD. AT THE CONCLUSION OF DISCUSSIONS, THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO VACATE STAY IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA; COURT REPORTER: ROSE MILLER, CSR NO. 5041, EMAIL: RMILLERCSR@GMAIL.COM. (302/RBU)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2022 Set For Order To Show Cause On Feb-07-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Vacate Stay
Off Calendar May-13-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference):
Luis O. Ramirez, Defendant and Self-Represented Litigant;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S Motion To Vacate Stay.

The matter is called. Mr. Ramirez states that he did not know that he was to notify the other side, that he called the other side a few weeks ago, that he was told to appear in court, and that he wants to take care of the matter. Brief DISCUSSIONS are held.

At the conclusion of discussions, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'s unopposed motion to vacate stay is granted.

Counsel for the plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR No. 5041, Email: RMillerCSR@gmail.com. (302/RBU)
